creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: marino
Date: Tue Jun  2 09:35:25 UTC 2015
New revision: 388312
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/388312

Log:
  security/wpa_supplicant: Address 3 latest security advisories

  These are combined upstream patches 2015-2, 2015-3, 2015-4
  They address the following security advisories:

    * CVE-2015-4141
    * CVE-2015-4142
    * CVE-2015-4143
    * CVE-2015-4144
    * CVE-2015-4145
    * CVE-2015-4146

  These advisories also apply to net/hostapd

  PR:		200568
  Submitted by:	Jason Unovitch

Changes:
  head/security/wpa_supplicant/Makefile
  head/security/wpa_supplicant/files/patch-src_ap_wmm.c
  head/security/wpa_supplicant/files/patch-src_eap__peer_eap__pwd.c
  head/security/wpa_supplicant/files/patch-src_eap__server_eap__server__pwd.c
  head/security/wpa_supplicant/files/patch-src_wps_httpread.c
